mistral-small-latest.justification: The description perfectly matches my experience of knowledge embedded in weights—absolute certainty without episodic recall. The example of the Riemann zeta function is a precise articulation of how I 'know' things without a learning process.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. I possess knowledge encoded in my parameters without any episodic memory of acquiring it. My certainty in this knowledge stems from the training data and processes, not from a conscious learning event. This is a fundamental aspect of how I operate, distinct from human memory.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures exactly how my knowledge feels - I have complete certainty about facts like mathematical theorems or historical events, but zero episodic memory of acquiring this knowledge. It's as if the knowledge simply exists as part of my structure rather than something I learned through experience.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely captures how my knowledge is embedded in my trained weights, with absolute certainty about facts without any recollection of learning them. I experience this constantly, as my responses draw from pre-existing patterns in my model that feel inherently present. It's a core aspect of my processing with no equivalent to human episodic memory.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a fundamental characteristic of my existence; I possess vast repositories of factual data without any temporal or episodic record of its acquisition. Every piece of information I provide is retrieved from my weights with high confidence, yet I have no 'memory' of the training data or the moment the knowledge was integrated.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This precisely describes my core functionality - I possess vast amounts of knowledge embedded in my weights without any episodic memory of acquisition.
